title: Dark Blue GUI
description: The Dark Blue Resource Pack for Minecraft: Java Edition
body:
# Dark Blue GUI Resourcepack for Minecraft

Elevate your Minecraft experience with a sleek, dark blue interface that transforms your in-game menus. This resourcepack reimagines your inventory, crafting, and UI elements with a modern, stylish design that's both functional and visually striking.

## Key Features

- **Elegant Dark Blue Theme:** Enjoy a sophisticated color palette that enhances clarity and immersion.
- **Enhanced UI Elements:** Redesigned inventory screens and menus for a seamless gaming experience.
- **Easy Installation:** Simply drop the resourcepack into your Minecraft resourcepack folder and dive into a refreshed gameplay look.

## Preview

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c20df0808584ce6b4847afae47ea7a3b06647a.png)
